name: Frozen Friday Night: The Eve
short_description: FFN Eve, the prequel to Flaming Friday Night, is a Horror Noir Action RPG. The Santa Mask Suit and the Whispering Sunrise Forest await Rose and Pandu. Merry Christmas, and happy insane journey.
detailed_description:
Frozen Journey Roadmap and Q&A

Good evening, survivors. This is the FFN Team.

We would like to share the roadmap for our planned updates.

Update 1

completed.

Update 2

completed.

Update 3

Small enjoyable pastime for healing after terrifying experiences (also offers XP)

New snacks

Update 4

Bug fixes and frame optimization

Update 5

New pizzas

Update 6

completed.

Update 7

New pet

Update 8

Journal UI

Update 9

completed.

Update 10

Enable Pandu as a playable character

Update 11

New evil faction (Human type)

Update 12

New stores and merchants

Update 13

Extension of the new evil faction

Update 14

New raid boss (Human type)

Update 15

New creatures

Update 16

New killer

Update 17

Furniture store

Update 18

New raid boss (Creature type)

Update 19

New killer

Update 20

New creature

Update 21

New state and new city accessible

Update 22

New killers

Update 23

New raid boss

Update 24

New Apparel

Please note that features may be modified, omitted, or new ones added.

Q&A

When will Flaming Friday Night be re-released?

Possibly sometime between the 20th and 21st updates of Frozen Friday Night: The Eve.

Why didn't you guys consider Early Access?

Actually, we considered it. Steamworks requested a draft revision, but we aimed to release Frozen Friday Night: The Eve on Christmas Eve and didn't have enough time for revisions. Therefore, we released FFN EVE without Early Access and continue to add planned content.

We always appreciate your interest and support.

Cheers,

FFN Team


About the Game

Oh, hey. It's you! Have a seat and grab some pizza. Champagne? I'm good, thank you. Except I messed up the History of Art, you know, like Baroque, Rococo, Bauhaus, Cubism... yeah, they really make me wanna puke. So, how have you been? We've barely talked in a year. I thought you were so quiet at first. Oh, I almost forgot your name, haha. Sorry. Oh, really? Same! I'm Jimmy. Cheers, really nice to see you again, friend. Let's get wasted tonight then! By the way, do you like scary movies?

Synopsis

On a Friday night, deep in the Christmas season, Setsuka throws a festive party and invites her friends to join in the merriment. As the night progresses, and the drinks flow, an unexpected blackout shrouds the gathering in darkness. That's when Rose and Pandu search for their friends.

FFN Eve, the prequel to Flaming Friday Night, is a Horror Noir Action RPG. The Santa Mask Suit and the Whispering Sunrise Forest await Rose and Pandu. Merry Christmas, and happy insane journey.

Key Features

• Survivors can play as the tough and cool Rose. (Pandu will be available as a playable character in a future update.)

• Survivors will meet all kinds of people: good, bad, or weird.

• Survivors will enjoy great dinner options that offer various buffs.

• Survivors can enjoy a variety of small experiences. (More will be added.)

• Various weapons are waiting for survivors. Be their best friends. (More will be added.)

• Survivors can fortify yourselves in various ways: leveling up, perks, super protein, reading, discovering four-leaf clovers, and more. These help you against the scary enemies.

• The night is still being updated. Until their journey ends, Rose and Pandu will encounter new enemies and step into new stories.

Warning

This horror game contains extremely brutal and violent content, including blood, murder, and dismemberment elements. Streamers should set their live streaming settings to allow only adults to watch while you're playing this game. The infirm, pregnant women, and children must not play this game. Additionally, this videogame may cause people with photosensitive epilepsy to convulse in seizures. Player discretion is advised.

The content of this videogame is purely fictional, is not intended to represent or depict any actual event, person, or entity, and any such similarities are purely coincidental. The makers and publishers of this game do not in any way endorse, condone or encourage engaging in any conduct depicted in this videogame.

All characters in this videogame do not represent any country, race, organization, gender, generation, and so on. Each of them is a unique individual.
